subcodes.first_line: My spirit be a sacrifice for your love! The handwriting of that Beloved of heart and soul arrived and was presented in the Kingdom of utterance, and He spoke forth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: روحی لحبکم الفدآء دستخط آنمحبوب دل و جان رسید و در ملکوت بیان عرض شد فرمودند
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @corruption and decline of Islam; of the Shi'ih, @martyrs and martyrdom, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @law of Huququ'llah
